Class OutboxMessage

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.domain.model.OutboxMessage
public class OutboxMessage extends Object
Domain entity representing a pending outbound AMQP message stored in the transactional outbox table.

The Transactional Outbox Pattern solves the dual-write problem: rather than publishing directly to RabbitMQ inside a database transaction (which risks inconsistency if the broker is unavailable), we atomically persist a serialized message record to the outbox_messages table in the same Postgres transaction. A background scheduler subsequently polls unpublished rows, publishes them to the broker, and marks them as published.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final Instant
    createdAt
    The moment this outbox record was created (same as the enclosing transaction).
    private final String
    exchange
    The AMQP exchange the message should be routed through.
    private final UUID
    id
    Unique identifier for this outbox record.
    private final String
    payload
    The JSON-serialized message payload.
    private boolean
    published
    Indicates whether this message has been successfully delivered to the broker.
    private Instant
    publishedAt
    The moment this outbox record was published to the broker, or null if pending.
    private final String
    routingKey
    The AMQP routing key that determines which queues receive the message.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private final UUID id
      Unique identifier for this outbox record.

    • exchange

      private final String exchange
      The AMQP exchange the message should be routed through.

    • routingKey

      private final String routingKey
      The AMQP routing key that determines which queues receive the message.

    • payload

      private final String payload
      The JSON-serialized message payload.

    • published

      private boolean published
      Indicates whether this message has been successfully delivered to the broker. Starts as false; set to true by the outbox relay scheduler.

    • createdAt

      private final Instant createdAt
      The moment this outbox record was created (same as the enclosing transaction).

    • publishedAt

      private Instant publishedAt
      The moment this outbox record was published to the broker, or null if pending.

  • Constructor Details

    • OutboxMessage

      public OutboxMessage(UUID id, String exchange, String routingKey, String payload, boolean published, Instant createdAt, Instant publishedAt)
      Full constructor used when reconstituting a record from the persistence layer.
      Parameters:
      id - the outbox message UUID
      exchange - the target AMQP exchange
      routingKey - the AMQP routing key
      payload - the JSON payload
      published - whether the message has been delivered to the broker
      createdAt - the creation timestamp
      publishedAt - the publish timestamp, or null

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static OutboxMessage create(String exchange, String routingKey, String payload)
      Factory method that creates a new, unpublished outbox message.
      Parameters:
      exchange - the target AMQP exchange
      routingKey - the AMQP routing key
      payload - the JSON payload
      Returns:
      a new OutboxMessage with published=false

    • markPublished

      public void markPublished()
      Marks this outbox message as having been successfully published to the broker.

    • getId

      public UUID getId()
      Returns the outbox message identifier.
      Returns:
      the UUID

    • getExchange

      public String getExchange()
      Returns the target AMQP exchange name.
      Returns:
      the exchange name

    • getRoutingKey

      public String getRoutingKey()
      Returns the AMQP routing key.
      Returns:
      the routing key

    • getPayload

      public String getPayload()
      Returns the JSON-serialized message payload.
      Returns:
      the payload string

    • isPublished

      public boolean isPublished()
      Returns whether the message has been delivered to the broker.
      Returns:
      true if published

    • getCreatedAt

      public Instant getCreatedAt()
      Returns the creation timestamp.
      Returns:
      the creation Instant

    • getPublishedAt

      public Instant getPublishedAt()
      Returns the publish timestamp.
      Returns:
      the publish Instant, or null if not yet published
